title: MicroTech: Modernized
description: A remake of my Microtech modpack for 1.20.1, featuring Create, ComputerCraft, AE2 and much more
body:
# Features :
- Create mod with a bunch of addon
- Applied Energistics 2
- ComputerCraft
- Chisel Reborn, Stoneworks and other decorations mods
- Waystone, Nature's Compass, Xaero's World map and other exploration mods
- A bunch of optimisations mods like Embeddium
- QOL mods like AppleSkin, Carry on, Find me...
- Foods mods with Farmer's Delights and Cooking for Blockheads
- Cool cars with Automobility !
- Early game bulk storage with Iron Chest: Restocked and Sophisticated Backpacks

## To note :
- This modpack has a mod that prevent creeper from griefing. You can disable it as you like.

## Why choose this modpack :
The purpose of this modpack is having fun with a bunch of new features, will not being too heavy on your computer. This modpack is tested on a third gen AMD laptop APU, so i can guarantee smooth gameplay on low-end PC. This modpack is even more fun if you play with friend, if you don't have a server you can install the really good [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) mod !

## The modpack updating system :
This modpack use a very simple way of update version :
The first number is major version, wich i rarely use.  
The second is a minor version, wich add new features, or remove some  
The third is a patch version, wich fix bugs, or changes configs  
Sometime there will be a letter after the third number, it's a quick patch, wich fix bugs as fast has possible after a version release.  
This version system is a bit like [Semantic Versioning 2.0.0](https://semver.org/)  

Also note that i will eventually stop to update this modpack when a good very stable version come out
